chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1812 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondents No.2 and 3. Mr. Sharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner is not present. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate files Vakalatnama for respondents No.2 and 3, same is taken on record. He has also submitted compliance report along with one cheque bearing No.56427813, amounting to Rs. 200,000/-(two hundred thousand rupees), dated 01.01.2026 in favor of petitioner. Cheque shall remain in safe custody of Additional Registrar, who is directed to hand over the same to the petitioner under receipt of acknowledgment. For the remaining amount of Rs.5,54,644/- (five lacs, fifty four thousand, six hundred forty four rupees), he states that same will be paid to the petitioner in monthly installments on every 10th day of the month. Counsel for petitioner is satisfied with that arrangement which shall be treated as the undertaking of the Municipal Committee Khairpur. The petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
